command.sendTestNotification: Claude Code Notifier Plus: Send Test Notification
config.title: Claude Code Notifier Plus
config.notifyOnPermissionRequest: Notify when Claude is asking for permission to run a command.
config.notifyOnQuestion: Notify when Claude needs to ask you a question before continuing.
config.notifyOnTaskComplete: Notify when Claude finishes a task and is waiting for your next instruction.
config.notifyOnSubagentStop: Notify when a Claude subagent finishes its task.
config.systemNotification: Show an OS-level notification pop-up in addition to the VS Code notification.
config.sound: Play a sound when Claude needs your attention.
config.notificationDelay: Seconds to wait before playing sound and showing the OS notification. Dismissing the VS Code popup within this time cancels them.
config.showVSCodePopup: Show a VS Code warning popup when Claude needs attention. Turn off to only receive OS-level system notifications and sound.
config.clickToFocus.description: 🖱️ Click-to-focus behavior. Requires 'terminal-notifier' on macOS → run: brew install terminal-notifier
config.clickToFocus.window: ⭐ Recommended — Click notification to jump to the exact project window. Requires Accessibility permission on first use.
config.clickToFocus.app: 👍 No extra permissions — Click notification to activate VS Code (brings to front, but won't target a specific window).
config.clickToFocus.off: 🚫 Disabled — Click notification does nothing. Falls back to basic osascript notification.
config.suppressWhenFocused: Skip the system notification and sound when VS Code is the active window. The VS Code popup still appears. When false (default), notifications are always sent regardless of focus state.
